prompt: A vast deep-space starfield, almost entirely black. Thousands of stars at varying brightness, a dense glowing core of warm golden-white stars fading outward into increasingly dim ghostly barely-visible points of amber and brown light. The outermost stars are so faint they are nearly indistinguishable from the void. No text, no labels, no charts, no axes. Pure astronomical photograph aesthetic. Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution. The light dies at the edges.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Of Earth's ~7,000 living languages, 2,500 are endangered and one disappears every two weeks — each extinction an irreversible loss of a unique way of knowing the world.
